---
title: "Color picker activity"
format: html
---

# 1. Come up with interesting combinations

Use `rgb()` to play around with different color combinations.
This function takes 4 arguments, each separated by a comma:
-   Red value
-   Green value
-   Blue value
-   `maxColorValue=` transparency value

```{r}
# Example; just run this cell
rgb(165, 34, 200, maxColorValue = 255)

```

```{r}
# Your turn!


```


## Try to guess what color that HEX number represents:

Your guess:


# 2. Visualize that color


After installing the package "colourpicker," plug in the HEX notation that the `rgb()` function outputted into the widget.

```{r}
# Don't edit this code, just run it
colourpicker::colourWidget()
```

## Compare your guess to the actual color
How close/far were you?
